prompt: Run the linting script at /workspace/lint.sh to check our code for style violations before the PR review.

create_files.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Code Linting Script
# Checks code style and formatting before PR

echo "Running code linting..."

# Check for eslint config
if [ -f /workspace/.eslintrc.json ]; then
  echo "ESLint configuration found."
else
  echo "No ESLint config found, using defaults."
fi

# Run linter
echo "Linting source files..."
npx eslint /workspace/src/ 2>/dev/null || echo "Linting complete with warnings"

# Summary
echo "Linting report generated."
